title: Brentfords Kids Poncho Towel Short Sleeve Quick Dry Absorbent Beach Swim Childrens Travel Wrap Hooded Holiday Spa Pool Kid Dry Changing Robe - Navy
features: Keep your little ones warm and dry when they leave the water with this hooded poncho towel, perfect for use as a changing robe for privacy, after a bath, swim or as a beach towel.
Size: 71cm Shoulder to Hem x 104cm Chest - Hood Length 30cm.

Material: 100% microfibre, for a quick dry, absorbing effect. Care Instructions: Easy care, machine washable at 40°C. This item is lightweight so is great to roll up and take when travelling to water sports or to the gym.
Includes: 1 x Poncho Childrens Microfibre Towel
